domain_boundary: CubiCasa SEG-IR universe only; E1 working-drawing transfer UNVERIFIED; every REPORT must quote this boundary

governance.title: D14 PARKED
governance.reopen_gate: G6_CLOSURE_OK AND M16_COMPLETE_F15_F21_NUMERIC AND M7_F02PRIME_PASS AND F03_REMEASURE_PASS

state_machine.closure_ok_iff: F08-F14 all NUMERIC AND F01-F07 all PERMANENT_UNKNOWN AND F22-F28 all PARKED AND F15-F21 all READY_FOR_GPU

governance.title: gen3 direction record
governance.target: E1 working-drawing face stats (+Cheongju if M-11 PASS)
governance.ordering: M-6 adapter first; execution prereg sealed separately

measurement.title: val-B single batch
measurement.notes: first irreversible outcome; failure after contact = GOVERNANCE_STOP then G-7

measurement.title: F02-prime remeasure
measurement.gate: M-6 PASS AND gen3 execution prereg own-gate PASS

measurement.title: RSI inner loop run 1
measurement.gate: C-3 selftest PASS AND M-14 library SHA sealed AND proposer template SHA + fixed settings sealed
measurement.cap: RTX 16h + CPU 24h, iterations <=30, per-candidate RTX <=20min or CPU <=120min (1 RTX-min = 6 CPU-min), final re-eval RTX <=1h included
measurement.search_signal: RSI-public only, min delta 0.002, tie keeps incumbent
measurement.anomaly_jump: public gain >=0.02 forces reverify tolerance 0.005, fail = discard
measurement.winner_selection: top-5 public then single private evaluation; winner private <= GNN-A baseline = NO_IMPROVEMENT
measurement.proposer: LLM with sealed prompt template SHA; fixed model ID + decoding params sealed at C-3 landing, identical across all iterations, mismatch = run invalid; commit-then-evaluate; inputs = public ledger + current best code + sealed search space only
measurement.valb_entry: FORBIDDEN this wave (series=9 sealed); next-wave reveal candidate only

measurement.title: ontology constraint real track
measurement.procedure: schema+process pre-seal, compile rules, freeze library + SHA seal, then measure; post-measure edits forbidden
measurement.scoring: rule violation flags, weight 1 fixed, AUPRC via sealed evaluator
measurement.residual: GNN-A 3-seed pooled predictions threshold 0.5 FP union FN; capture rate = flagged residuals / all residuals
measurement.independence: no F02/F03/F04 synthetic chain dependency; D14 stays PARKED

measurement.title: deterministic_v1 relegislation
measurement.kill: numbers before spec seal = INVALID; no v0 comparison/backfill

measurement.title: F04G GPU judge
measurement.cap: RTX 6h total, per-cell <=50min, no post-hoc transfer

measurement.title: image jury
measurement.gate: after M-1 adjudication AND exposure whitelist sealed

code_landing.title: R51 raster trainer
code_landing.ready_rule: OPEN != READY; build + selftest + SHA seal before M-9

code_landing.title: RSI harness landing
code_landing.split_contract: drawing-level SHA-256(drawing_id + ':e2.w3.rsi_split.v1') first 8 hex as int, mod 10 in {0,1,2} = RSI-private (30%), else RSI-public (70%); manifest SHA sealed; private < 40 drawings = selftest FAIL
code_landing.permission_split: private labels readable by sealed-evaluator process only; optimizer/candidates path-guarded fail-closed (val-B, test, RSI-private)
code_landing.ledgers: public ledger (optimizer-visible) + private ledger (harness-only, disclosed after run) both append-only JSONL
code_landing.selftest: mock candidate proves all 3 guards block + split determinism + private minimum size
code_landing.deliverables: proposer prompt template SHA + fixed model/decoding settings seal

disposition_only.rule: next-prereg candidate only if M-9 PASS; no W3 execution
M-11 PASS alone does not unlock; unlock = next prereg

2: M-13(C-3 AND M-14 lib SHA AND proposer seal)
3: T20/M31/M32 F-axis if dependency AND satisfied

cpu_parallel: write-ownership disjoint + RAM watchdog + concurrency cap 6
kill_rules: amendment3 round-trip fail or hash mismatch -> zero reveals
G1 AND G2 unmet -> ADJ-FAIL (DEV history preserved, RSI_ADOPT forbidden, G-7 autopsy)
F08-F14 numbers without extractor prereg -> INVALID
M-9 fired without M-8/C-1 precedence -> void
DGX GPU number band move -> governance interrupt
jury exposure of val-B drawings -> violation
RSI private label access trace -> entire run invalid + halt
RSI anomaly-jump reverify fail -> candidate discarded
RSI private score exposure mid-loop -> entire run invalid
RSI proposer settings mismatch vs sealed value -> run invalid
M-15 numbers before spec seal -> INVALID
M-14 rule change after library seal -> measurement void
anomaly_stop: new defect class, ledger mismatch, hash drift, dependency interpretation conflict, val-B failure: no alternative interpretation, no retry, no silent repair - STOP, freeze, escalate to Paul; sole exception = G-7 read-only autopsy
non_goals: val-B second batch or arm additions
